title: Successful account creation with valid email and password meeting minimum length
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., testuser@example.com)
Enter a password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a confirmation message (e.g., 'Account created successfully')
User is redirected to the login or dashboard page
The new account is stored in the system with the provided email and password

title: Account creation with duplicate email is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Navigate to the account creation page
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
No new account is created in the system

title: Account creation with password less than 8 characters is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., newuser@example.com)
Enter a password of 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No account is created

title: Account creation with password exactly 8 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary@test.com)
Enter a password of exactly 8 characters (e.g., Pass1234)
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a success message
The account is stored in the system

title: Account creation with password of 7 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary7@test.com)
Enter a password of exactly 7 characters (e.g., Pass123)
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed: 'Password must be at least 8 characters long'
No account is created

title: Account creation with password of 9 characters
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
No existing account with the email to be used
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., boundary9@test.com)
Enter a password of exactly 9 characters (e.g., Pass12345)
expected_results: Account is created successfully
User receives a success message
The account is stored in the system

title: Concurrent registration attempts with the same email
preconditions: System is ready to handle concurrent requests
test_steps: Prepare to send multiple simultaneous registration requests with the same email 'race@test.com' and valid password
Send 5 concurrent requests to the account creation endpoint
Wait for all responses to be received
expected_results: Only one account is created successfully with the email 'race@test.com'
All other requests are rejected with an error indicating the email is already taken or a conflict
The system does not create duplicate accounts
No race condition or data integrity issue occurs

title: Account creation with duplicate email using different case is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Navigate to the account creation page
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
No new account is created in the system

title: Account creation with duplicate email with leading/trailing spaces is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'existing@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Navigate to the account creation page
Enter the email address ' existing@example.com ' (with leading and trailing spaces)
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
No new account is created in the system

title: Account creation with empty password is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., emptypwd@test.com)
Leave the confirm password field empty
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No account is created

title: Account creation with password containing only spaces is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid unique email address (e.g., spaces@test.com)
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the password must be at least 8 characters long
No account is created

title: Account creation with empty email is rejected
preconditions: User is on the account creation page
test_steps: Enter a valid password of at least 8 characters (e.g., Password123)
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is required or invalid
No account is created

title: Account creation with duplicate email after successful deletion of original account
preconditions: An account with email 'deleted@example.com' existed previously but has been deleted from the system
test_steps: Navigate to the account creation page
expected_results: Account creation is successful
User receives a confirmation message
The new account is stored in the system with the provided email

title: Account creation with duplicate email using special characters in email is rejected
preconditions: An existing account with email 'test+alias@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Navigate to the account creation page
expected_results: Account creation is rejected
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
No new account is created in the system

title: Account creation with duplicate email after multiple failed attempts with same email
preconditions: An existing account with email 'retry@example.com' already exists in the system
test_steps: Navigate to the account creation page
Click the 'Create Account' button and observe rejection
expected_results: First attempt is rejected due to password length
Second attempt is rejected due to duplicate email
An error message is displayed indicating that the email is already in use
No new account is created in the system
